2298240.name: Kinetic Neo Ornate Bout
2298240.description:
Twin-stick multitasking

You're playing a classic ball game while juggling minigames and pushing snails that punish your opponent. Use abilities to defeat your rivals.

4-player local multiplayer mayhem

Chaos on your couch! Invite friends and play high-energy 2v2 matches. Or try 1v1 if you dare.

And just when you think you can handle it..

..the green snail swaps your sticks, your opponent charges the powered-up version of the most destructive ability in the game, and you totally forgot to play the minigame.

The pumping music..

..is the only thing you can rely on in Kinetic Neo Ornate Bout.

Join us on discord

Confused by the chaos? Or just found your new favourite couch game? Join our discord and tell us what you think.

Controller Recommended

For the best experience, play with a gamepad. Keyboard works, but button prompts are not shown. Steam input should be turned OFF for best experience. With it ON, the game still works, but controllers connected after the game starts – or reconnect later – may not be recognized correctly.
